title: lindernia dubia
intro: Lindernia dubia, also known as false lipwort, is a flowering plant species found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lindernia dubia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lindernia dubia is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can also be used to make extracts or tinctures for various herbal preparations.
